author: michellegdyason
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Preview and apply bulk vault reorganization plans for notes, attachments, templates, canvases, and other files.

manifest.author: Michelle GDyason
manifest.description: Preview and apply bulk vault reorganization plans for notes, attachments, templates, canvases, and other files.
manifest.name: Vault Reorganizer

name: Vault Reorganizer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog

## 0.1.7

- Added the Six folder vault strategy label with Bases support.
- Added configurable destination folders for notes, attachments, templates, canvases, Bases, and other files.
- Added cleanup reporting for hidden blockers in visible folders.
- Excluded hidden dot paths and generated Vault Reorganizer reports from reorganization.
- Added rename fallbacks for root-flattening moves that Obsidian refuses.
